data.body: Design complete + decomposed into 6 discrete-deliverable child stories (S1-S6): S1 unified resolver + FORCE_CLOSE bugfix; S2 record on claim/transition; S3 read surface + compaction guarantee; S4 Claude Code SessionStart shim (local CLI); S5 multi-harness resolver + harness provenance; S6 Codex + Cursor capture shims. Design covered: unknowns resolved, 4 derisking experiments (live env probe found the FORCE_CLOSE resolver misses CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID; extra data keys are forward-compat; snapshot restore is generic; Jira map is an allow-list so the field is local-only), and an OSS survey (Claude Code hooks, claude-mem, ccusage, OpenCode OPENCODE_SESSION_ID, Codex/Cursor env FRs, Langfuse/LangSmith/OTel naming, provenance-trailer consent lessons). Ordered env-var contract: REBAR_SESSION_ID -> CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID -> OPENCODE_SESSION_ID -> CODEX_THREAD_ID -> SESSION_ID -> None.
